Experiences](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/events/host-an-event/private-experiences/) ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/eljnsvr4/fernbank_museumnights_internals_subpagemarquee_headline.jpg) ## Museum Nights A visit to Fernbank during daytime hours is always a good idea, but don't miss out on the chance to explore Fernbank after hours, too.  Discover Museum Nights for a series of experiences and events throughout the year. There’s always something new to do when your adventurous side calls for a night at the museum! * * * **Everyone Nights (All ages welcome!)** | | | | --- | --- | | ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/gg5b4gji/fernbank_museumnights_icon_04.png?rmode=max&width=99&height=99) | **LATER** June - Aug. 2026
More info coming soon! | * * * **Adults-Only Nights (Ages 21+)** | | | | --- | --- | | ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/ze4npsee/fernbank_museumnights_icon_01.png?rmode=max&width=99&height=99) | [**Fernbank After Dark**](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/experiences/fernbank-after-dark/)
2nd Friday of Every Month \| March - Oct. \| 7 – 11 p.m.
A unique after-hours experience for grown-ups, including museum exhibits, live music, full bars, science and more! | | ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/cygb0qcu/fernbank_museumnights_icon_02.png?rmode=max&width=100&height=100) | **[Adult Prom: Back to the Future](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/events/calendar-of-events/2026/04/17-adult-prom/ "17 - Adult Prom")** Friday, April 17, 2026 \| 7:30 – 11 p.m.
Dance through time beneath the towering dinosaurs, explore the museum after hours, and relive prom—this time with better music, better drinks, and no chaperones. | | ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/gg5b4gji/fernbank_museumnights_icon_04.png?rmode=max&width=99&height=99) | **[Sips & Science](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/support/ways-to-give/sips-science/ "Sips & Science")** Thursday, April 23, 2026 \| 6 - 8:30 p.m.
Get ready for an unforgettable evening where curiosity and fun come together at Fernbank. | * * * **Teen Nights (Exclusively for ages 13-17)** | | | | --- | --- | | ![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/s1wpqtqw/fernbank_museumnights_icon_03.png?rmode=max&width=99&height=99) | **Teen Takeover**
Saturday, July 25, 2026 \| 6 - 9 p.m.
more info and tickets coming soon! | * * * All programming is subject to change without notice. ## Sign Up for Our Newsletter. Email Address Subscribe [![Fernbank Logo](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/FM_FullLogo_White_Tagline.png)](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/) Fernbank is a nonprofit natural history museum, giant screen theater and old-growth forest, and is not affiliated with Fernbank Science Center, which operates as a division of DeKalb County Schools. [767 Clifton Road, Atlanta, GA 30307](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Fernbank+Museum+of+Natural+History/@33.7742548,-84.3293625,17z/data=!3m1!5s0x88f506c3de7367a7:0x59a9cb5e74aeb4e0!4m8!1m2!3m1!2sFernbank+Museum+of+Natural+History!3m4!1s0x88f506c10eb73041:0xde2b6ca5505472a0!8m2!3d33.7739002!4d-84.3280493) [Guest.Services@FernbankMuseum.org](mailto:guest.services@fernbankmuseum.org) [404.929.6300](tel:404-929-6300) - [![Facebook](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/facebook-cta.png)](https://www.facebook.com/FernbankMuseum) - [![X](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/x-cta.png)](https://twitter.com/FernbankMuseum) - [![Instagram](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/instagram-cta.png)](https://www.instagram.com/fernbankmuseum/) - [![YouTube](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/youtube-cta.png)](https://www.youtube.com/user/FernbankMuseum) - [![TikTok](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/tiktok-cta.png)](https://www.tiktok.com/@fernbankmuseum) - [![E-news](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/icon-newsletter.png)](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/sign-up-for-e-news/) - [![Trip Advisor](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/trip-advisor-logo.png)](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g60898-d103499-Reviews-Fernbank_Museum_of_Natural_History-Atlanta_Georgia.html) - [![City Pass](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/images/footer/city-pass-logo.png)](https://www.citypass.com/atlanta?mv_source=fernbank&campaign=footer) - [Press Room](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/visit/press-room/) - [Privacy Policy](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/privacy-policy/) - [Credits](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/credits-and-copyright/) © 2026 Fernbank
